joycaption.name: JoyCaption Beta One
joycaption.desc: Purpose-built model for generating highly detailed natural-language image captions. (~4.9 GB)

qwen25vl.name: Qwen2.5-VL 7B
qwen25vl.desc: Strong general vision model. Good for structured descriptions, OCR, and scene analysis. (~4.5 GB + 1.3 GB projector)
